# kSecMatchSubjectContains

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is a string to look for in a certificate or identity’s subject.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecMatchSubjectContains: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFString]. If provided, returned certificates or identities are limited to those whose subject contains this string.
title: kSecMatchSubjectContains
